title: Floral Crispy Vietnamese Shrimp Crepes
description: Crispy, floral crepes filled with sauteed shrimp and a tangy passata sauce, a crowd-pleasing Vietnamese appetizer thats dairyfree and bursting with flavor.

ingredients.name: flour blend
ingredients.amount: 1 cup all-purpose flour, 1/2 cup rice flour, 1/4 cup tapioca starch blended

ingredients.name: jasmine tea infusion
ingredients.notes: brewed and cooled for floral note

instructions: Whisk the flour blend, sugar, salt, and warm water in a bowl until smooth; let the batter rest for 10 minutes.
Heat a non‑stick skillet over medium heat and drizzle with a little vegetable oil.
Pour a tablespoon of batter into the skillet and swirl to form a thin, round crepe; cook until the edges lift, about 1‑2 minutes.
Repeat with the remaining batter, stacking the cooked crepes on a plate.
In a separate pan, quickly sauté the shrimp in a splash of oil until pink and cooked through, then set aside.
In a small saucepan, combine passata, lime juice, fish sauce, jasmine tea infusion, and rose water; heat until simmering, then add chopped basil and stir until fragrant.
Fold the cooked shrimp into the sauce, allowing it to warm through for 1 minute.
Serve each crepe drizzled with the floral passata shrimp sauce, garnished with extra basil.
Warm the skillet lightly before adding each crepe to keep them crisp.
Offer lime wedges on the side for an extra burst of citrus.
